name: Palmetto Tennis Center
description: Palmetto Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Sumter, SC. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: RECREATION AND PARKS
description: Come play pickleball at RECREATION AND PARKS in Sumter, SC! There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Sumter Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Sumter Family YMCA in Sumter, SC! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Sumter High School
description: Sumter High School is a place to play pickleball in Sumter, SC. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. You can’t reserve the courts.
